subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath adorned his heart with the ornament of faith in the days of his Lord, the Most Merciful, that he may be assured that he is remembered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن زین قلبه بطراز الایمان فی ایام ربه الرحمن لیوقن انه یذکر من
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
